Package neqsim.process.util.optimizer

Class ProcessModelThroughputOptimizer.ProducerControl

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.util.optimizer.ProcessModelThroughputOptimizer.ProducerControl
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
ProcessModelThroughputOptimizer
public static class ProcessModelThroughputOptimizer.ProducerControl extends Object implements Serializable
Producer or feed control definition.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim Development Team

  • Constructor Details

    • ProducerControl

      public ProducerControl()
      Default constructor for serialization frameworks.

    • ProducerControl

      public ProducerControl(String name, String address, double baseValue, double lowerMultiplier, double upperMultiplier, String unit)
      Creates an automation-addressed producer control.
      Parameters:
      name - control name
      address - area-qualified automation address
      baseValue - base value before multiplier scaling
      lowerMultiplier - lower allowed multiplier
      upperMultiplier - upper allowed multiplier
      unit - unit used when reading and setting the value

    • ProducerControl

      public ProducerControl(String name, double lowerMultiplier, double upperMultiplier, BiConsumer<ProcessModel,Double> multiplierSetter)
      Creates a custom producer multiplier control.
      Parameters:
      name - control name
      lowerMultiplier - lower allowed multiplier
      upperMultiplier - upper allowed multiplier
      multiplierSetter - custom multiplier setter

    • getName

    • hasCustomSetter

      public boolean hasCustomSetter()
      Checks whether this control uses a custom setter.
      Returns:
      true when a custom setter is configured

    • resolveBaseValue

      private void resolveBaseValue(ProcessModel model)
      Resolves the base value from the process model when needed.
      Parameters:
      model - process model

    • applyMultiplier

      private void applyMultiplier(ProcessModel model, double multiplier)
      Applies a multiplier to the target control.
      Parameters:
      model - process model
      multiplier - multiplier to apply
